name: @borjie/compliance-pack
description: Compliance pack — SOC2/ISO27001/GDPR/CCPA/POPIA/TZ/KE/UG/RW/NG control catalogs + DSAR automation + right-to-erasure cascade with legal-hold + envelope encryption with cross-tenant context binding + per-region residency policy + per-jurisdiction breach notification. Pure functions, no DB or KMS dependency at type level.
